functional_checks.name: Codex workspace resolution
checks: cargo locate-project --workspace returns codex-rs/Cargo.toml
workspace_manifest.txt is written
workspace_root.txt resolves to the codex-rs root

functional_checks.name: Dual metadata capture
checks: metadata.workspace.json is valid JSON and contains workspace members
metadata.host.json is valid JSON and contains resolve nodes
capture provenance records the source head and codex-rs workspace

functional_checks.name: Pilot package census
checks: packages.tsv is emitted
the pilot assets appear as package or asset buckets where applicable
workspace-summary.json records package count and workspace root

functional_checks.name: Pilot dependency edges
checks: package-edges.tsv is emitted
core/app-server/tui_app_server/state/exec-server relationships are derivable
Cargo.lock movement can invalidate edge freshness

functional_checks.name: Target and ownership inventory
checks: targets.tsv is emitted
ownership can be mapped at file/package-root precision
environment path semantics are reflected in ownership joins

functional_checks.name: Protocol and transport drift detection
checks: app-server-protocol changes are represented as an analysis-significant asset
deleted protocol/schema paths are recorded explicitly
exec-server transport deletions are preserved in summaries

functional_checks.name: Asset-bucket reporting
checks: changed files roll up into the post319 asset buckets
each asset gets a summary with commit count and key paths
core is treated as the primary reading anchor

functional_checks.name: New-folder detection
checks: current top-level codex-rs asset folders are inventoried
previous vs current asset inventory can detect introduced folders
introduced asset folders trigger index_refresh_required

functional_checks.name: Freshness gating
checks: index.json records target triple, feature mode, cargo version, source head, and Cargo.lock signal
changing any invalidator marks the index stale
downstream package-aware analysis can deny on stale or missing index

functional_checks.name: Artifact-first handoff
checks: index.json points to all produced pilot artifacts
deleted-in-head and introduced-assets signals are carried in the handoff
codex-web can consume the index without reading unstable app-server/TUI internals directly

micro_deliverables.name: Codex workspace probe
micro_deliverables.release_value: Proves the producer is anchored to the correct codex-rs workspace.

micro_deliverables.name: Raw metadata pair
micro_deliverables.release_value: Establishes the structural truth source for the narrowed Codex pilot.

micro_deliverables.name: Pilot package census
micro_deliverables.release_value: Gives codex-web and scripts a stable package inventory for the relevant Codex surfaces.

micro_deliverables.name: Pilot edge table
micro_deliverables.release_value: Makes cross-asset dependency structure visible without deeper protocol binding.

micro_deliverables.name: Ownership table
micro_deliverables.release_value: Enables package-aware attribution for files and summaries.

micro_deliverables.name: Protocol and transport drift report
micro_deliverables.release_value: Preserves the most analysis-shaping contract and transport changes, including deletions.

micro_deliverables.name: Asset-bucket summaries
micro_deliverables.release_value: Turns changed files into stable analysis units aligned with the post319 reading model.

micro_deliverables.name: Asset inventory trigger
micro_deliverables.release_value: Adds the new-folder signal that should force internal index refresh.

micro_deliverables.name: Freshness-aware handoff index
micro_deliverables.release_value: Creates the minimal production handoff surface for codex-web and just/scripts.
